asset.title: L3 No Clobber
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clear, step-by-step animation demonstrating optimistic concurrency control (CAS) when a human edits a cell mid-write, forcing the agent to re-read and commit safely.

featureClarity.evidence: The step-by-step progression clearly illustrates the CAS conflict and subsequent resolution.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the initial state, the conflict occurrence, the re-read of V2, and the final V3 commit.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode layout with clear row highlighting and progress indicators.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with the spreadsheet-based agent collaboration model.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Provides a high-fidelity conceptual walkthrough of the concurrency protocol.

legibility.evidence: Text, version chips, and status labels are highly readable.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for engineers designing multi-agent or human-in-the-loop transactional systems.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the conflict state and the necessity of a re-read before committing.

observedEvidence: Agent action log at the bottom
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch how NodeRoom's CAS protocol prevents clobbering: when a human edits a cell mid-write, the agent detects the conflict, re-reads the new value, and safely commits V3.
